user.title: Petlibro Local Setup
user.description: Choose how to set up your Petlibro feeder.

manual_serial.title: Manual Setup
manual_serial.description: Enter your feeder's serial number (DL_DEVICE_ID) and model. If your model is in the known credentials database, setup will be instant.

unknown_model.title: Unknown Model
unknown_model.description: No known credentials for model **{model}**. Choose how to provide MQTT credentials.

auto_detect.title: Auto-detect Credentials
auto_detect.description:
To capture your feeder's credentials:

1. Add a DNS host override in your router:
   - Hostname: **mqtt.us.petlibro.com**
   - IP: **{ha_ip}**
2. Click **Submit** to start listening
3. Wait for the feeder to reconnect (~30-90 seconds)

The serial number, model, and credentials will all be captured automatically.

auto_detect_confirm.title: Credentials Captured
auto_detect_confirm.description: Successfully captured credentials from your Petlibro feeder (model: **{model}**)! Please consider submitting these to the project so other users with your model don't need to sniff.

manual_credentials.title: Manual Credential Entry
manual_credentials.description: Enter the MQTT credentials from your feeder's CONNECT packet or serial console output.

broker.title: MQTT Broker
broker.description: Enter your local MQTT broker details. The feeder must be redirected to this broker via DNS override.

error.sniffer_timeout: No feeder connection detected. Check DNS redirect and try again.
error.sniffer_port_in_use: Port 1883 is already in use. Stop any MQTT broker first.
